overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a rain-soaked neon-lit futuristic city at night. The character transitions from open streets with massive holographic billboards, through a covered pedestrian walkway with reflective floors, and back into the bustling downtown area with heavy pedestrian activity.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban plaza with holographic advertisements

events.description: futuristic sedan drives past from right to left on the wet street

agents.ego_description: character walks steadily through the rain-soaked plaza toward the crosswalk

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving past on the wet street

entered.detail: large floating holographic advertisements displaying various products above the street
wide stone stairs with blue neon edge lighting leading to upper level
dark modern building facade with illuminated windows and signage

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a rain-soaked futuristic plaza at night, dominated by massive holographic billboards glowing with neon light. The character walks forward as a futuristic sedan passes by on the wet asphalt street to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian crosswalk leading to illuminated staircase

events.description: character steps onto the crosswalk and continues toward the staircase

agents.ego_description: character crosses the wet street heading toward the illuminated stairs while rain continues to fall

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with umbrella walking in the opposite direction across the crosswalk

entered.detail: tall illuminated pillar with white and cyan lighting marking the crosswalk edge
white striped pedestrian crossing painted on the wet asphalt

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the wet street via a marked crosswalk, approaching the neon-lit staircase. A pedestrian with an umbrella walks in the opposite direction, and the holographic billboards shift to the left side of the frame as the camera moves forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway entrance with reflective flooring

events.description: character enters the covered walkway at the top of the stairs, leaving the rain and open street
lighting shifts from mixed neon and ambient to predominantly artificial cyan neon strips

agents.ego_description: character climbs the wide illuminated stairs and enters the sleek covered corridor

entered.detail: long corridor with roof cover protecting from rain, lined with vertical light strips
series of vertical cyan neon light strips running along the corridor wall
highly polished marble floor reflecting the cyan neon lights overhead

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the neon-lit stairs and enters a covered walkway, transitioning from the rain-soaked street to a sheltered corridor. The environment shifts to artificial cyan lighting reflecting off the polished marble floors as the character moves deeper into the corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: upscale covered pedestrian corridor with storefronts and digital signage

events.description: character approaches the end of the corridor where the exit to the open street becomes visible

agents.ego_description: character walks through the sleek modern corridor passing illuminated storefronts and digital advertisements

notable_agents.action: distant figure walking ahead toward the corridor exit

entered.detail: illuminated wall sign reading 'BLUE' with spa text in cyan neon
digital screen displaying 'SWEET CLEAN SPEED 2' advertisement with green text

segments.scene_description: Walking through the enclosed corridor, the character passes by a 'BLUE' spa sign and digital advertisement screens. The vertical neon pillars line the right side as the character approaches the distant exit where the city street becomes visible again.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy downtown intersection with large digital billboards and pedestrian overpass

events.description: character exits the covered walkway back into the open rain-soaked street with heavy neon lighting
red sports car drives past on the wet street to the right

agents.ego_description: character walks along the busy sidewalk with other pedestrians carrying umbrellas in the rain

notable_agents.action: red sports car driving along the wet street past the intersection

entered.detail: massive building-mounted screen displaying 'SOIL' advertisement with muscular figure
vertical red neon sign reading 'HOTEL' on the distant building facade
elevated enclosed walkway connecting buildings above the street level

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered walkway, the character returns to the open rain-soaked street with heavy pedestrian traffic. A massive digital billboard displaying 'SOIL' dominates the right side, while a red sports car drives past. The environment is bustling with pedestrians carrying umbrellas beneath the glow of neon hotel signs and elevated walkways.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rain-soaked neon plaza through a sheltered corridor and back into a bustling futuristic downtown. It begins in an open plaza dominated by massive holographic billboards, moving forward as a futuristic sedan glides across the wet asphalt. As the character crosses a marked crosswalk, the camera ascends a neon-lit staircase, transitioning from the falling rain into a covered walkway defined by artificial cyan lighting and polished marble floors. The scene then shifts deeper into this enclosed corridor, passing digital advertisements and vertical neon pillars before approaching the distant exit. Finally, the camera emerges back into the open street, where the environment expands into a crowded cityscape filled with pedestrians carrying umbrellas, red sports cars, and towering digital billboards.
